title: Antibody conjugates of immune-modulatory compounds and uses thereof
abstract: Antibody conjugates of immune-modulatory compounds and pharmaceutical compositions for use in the treatment of disease, such as fibrotic diseases, autoimmune, or autoinflammatory diseases, are disclosed herein. The disclosed conjugates are useful, among other things, in treating fibrotic diseases, autoimmune diseases, or autoinflammatory diseases, such as by modulating TGFÎ²R1, TGFÎ²R2, TNKS, TNIK, or mTOR.
